CONTENT.Club career: Born in Naples, Letizia made his senior debut with Pianura in Serie D. In the summer of 2010 he joined Aversa Normanna.On 27 July 2012, Letizia moved to Carpi in a co-ownership deal. On 24 August 2013 he made his Serie B debut, starting in a 0–1 defeat against Ternana; Letizia scored his first goal on 26 December, netting his side's second of a 3–1 win at Virtus Lanciano.On 7 July 2017, he moved to newly promoted Benevento on a three-year contract.On 1 September 2023, Letizia moved on loan to Feralpisalò.
CONTENT.External links: Gaetano Letizia at TuttoCalciatori.net (in Italian)Gaetano Letizia at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Gaetano Letizia (born 29 June 1990) is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Serie C Group C club Benevento.
